children.heading: Caregiver
children.label: 1 Caregiver
children.text: The term “caregiver” means an individual, including a relative, neighbor, or family friend, who regularly or frequently provides care, with or without compensation, for a child for whom the individual is not the parent.

children.heading: Child care provider
children.label: 2 Child care provider
children.text: The term “child care provider” means a provider of non-residential child care services (including center-based, family-based, and in-home child care services) for compensation who or that is legally operating under State law, and complies with applicable State and local requirements for the provision of child care services.

children.heading: Early learning
children.label: 3 Early learning
children.text: The term “early learning”, used with respect to a program or activity, means learning designed to facilitate the development of cognitive, language, motor, and social-emotional skills for, and to promote learning readiness in, young children.

children.label: A
children.text: a program of services or activities that helps parents, caregivers, and child care providers incorporate early learning into the daily lives of young children; or

children.label: B
children.text: a program that directly provides early learning to young children.

children.heading: Indian tribe
children.label: 5 Indian tribe
children.text: The term “Indian tribe” has the meaning given the term in .section 5304 of title 25

children.heading: Local Council
children.label: 6 Local Council
children.text: The term “Local Council” means a Local Council established or designated under that serves one or more localities.section 9413(a) of this title

children.heading: Locality
children.label: 7 Locality
children.text: The term “locality” means a city, county, borough, township, or area served by another general purpose unit of local government, an Indian tribe, a Regional Corporation, or a Native Hawaiian entity.

children.heading: Parent
children.label: 8 Parent
children.text: The term “parent” means a biological parent, an adoptive parent, a stepparent, a foster parent, or a legal guardian of, or a person standing in loco parentis to, a child.

children.heading: Poverty line
children.label: 9 Poverty line
children.text: The term “poverty line” means the poverty line (as defined by the Office of Management and Budget, and revised annually in accordance with ) applicable to a family of the size involved.section 9902(2) of title 42

children.heading: Regional Corporation
children.label: 10 Regional Corporation
children.text: The term “Regional Corporation” means an entity listed in .section 619(4)(B) of title 42

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 11 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Health and Human Services.

children.heading: State
children.label: 12 State
children.text: The term “State” means each of the several States of the United States, the District of Columbia, and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico.

children.label: A
children.text: is required for certification under State and local laws, regulations, and policies;

children.label: B
children.text: is required to receive a nationally or State recognized credential or its equivalent;

children.label: C
children.text: is received in a postsecondary education program focused on early learning or early childhood development in which the individual is enrolled; or

children.label: D
children.text: is provided, certified, or sponsored by an organization that is recognized for its expertise in promoting early learning or early childhood development.

children.heading: Young child
children.label: 14 Young child
children.text: The term “young child” means any child from birth to the age of mandatory school attendance in the State where the child resides.
